name: Christiansburg Recreation Center
description: Christiansburg Recreation Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Christiansburg, VA. There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Washington Street Pickleball Courts
description: Come play pickleball at Washington Street Pickleball Courts in Blacksburg, VA! There are 14 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Reservations are available. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like water.
